skip_reason: Services offline at audit time — static-analysis mode only

escalations.title: Handlebars RCE via AST Type Confusion
escalations.description: 8 vulnerabilities in handlebars including arbitrary code execution via AST type confusion and prototype pollution

escalations.title: protobufjs Arbitrary Code Execution
escalations.description: Arbitrary code execution via specially crafted protobuf messages. Introduced transitively via OpenTelemetry SDK chain.

p1_findings.title: GET /api/search endpoint not wired into app.ts
p1_findings.description: FR-dependency-search requires GET /api/search?q= endpoint. 5 tests exist and are marked failing. workItemsApi.searchItems() calls this URL — DependencyPicker typeahead is broken at runtime.
p1_findings.exploit_scenario: Any user of the DependencyPicker typeahead gets no results — the frontend silently fails on every search. 5 tests fail on every npm test run.
p1_findings.impact: Feature broken at runtime; CI red on every run
p1_findings.recommendation: Implement route handler in workItems.ts (filter getAllItems() by title/description, exclude deleted, return {data: T[]}) and add app.use('/api/search', …) to app.ts.

p2_findings.title: Traceability enforcer is blind to Specifications/ — 89+ requirements unmonitored
p2_findings.description: Enforcer auto-selects only the most recently modified Plans/**/requirements.md. 76 FRs in Specifications/dev-workflow-platform.md and 13 in tiered-merge-pipeline.md are completely outside enforcement scope.
p2_findings.recommendation: Add --specs flag to enforcer or document which spec files are intentionally out-of-scope in inspector.config.yml.

p2_findings.title: FR-dependency-seed has zero implementation
p2_findings.description: Spec requires idempotent seed data (BUG-0010 blocked by BUG-0003/4/5/6/7, FR chains). String FR-dependency-seed appears nowhere in Source/. DependencyPicker has no pre-loaded graph.
p2_findings.recommendation: Add Source/Backend/src/store/seed.ts called from app.ts startup, guarded by process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'test'.

p2_findings.title: Missing dependencyCheckDuration histogram metric
p2_findings.description: FR-dependency-metrics specifies 4 Prometheus metrics. 3 counters present; dependencyCheckDuration histogram absent. Latency for readiness checks is invisible to Prometheus.
p2_findings.recommendation: Add Histogram for dependency_check_duration_seconds and instrument isReady() / computeHasUnresolvedBlockers().

p2_findings.title: Duplicate frontend test files at two paths
p2_findings.description: WorkItemDetailPage.test.tsx and WorkItemListPage.test.tsx each exist at both tests/ root and tests/pages/. Both picked up by Vitest — duplicate IDs in CI, conflicting mocks, inaccurate coverage.
p2_findings.recommendation: Delete stale copies in tests/ root; keep tests/pages/ versions (verify with git log).

p2_findings.title: path-to-regexp ReDoS Vulnerability
p2_findings.description: Specially crafted URLs can cause excessive CPU usage and service denial via ReDoS in Express route parsing.

p2_findings.title: picomatch ReDoS & Method Injection
p2_findings.description: ReDoS via extglob quantifiers and method injection via POSIX character classes. Affects build/deploy pipeline.

p2_findings.title: OpenTelemetry SDK significant version gap (0.47 → 0.215)
p2_findings.description: OTel SDK is 6+ months behind. Critical observability infrastructure. Also introduces protobufjs RCE transitively (see DEP-002).
p2_findings.recommendation: Staged upgrade: npm update @opentelemetry/sdk-node @opentelemetry/exporter-trace-otlp-http and related packages.

p3_findings.title: DebugPortalPage.tsx has invalid FR traceability reference
Vite path traversal in optimized deps
Express & multer major version gaps (v4 → v5)

p4_findings.title: Missing license declarations in 4 package.json files
Large transitive dependency trees (portal/Backend: 397 direct deps)
